title: Rubus fontivagus

However, I found that Rubus is a genus of plants commonly known as raspberries and blackberries. If you are referring to one of these plants, here's a paragraph about Rubus species:

Rubus is a genus of thorny shrubs that produce edible fruits, commonly known as raspberries and blackberries. The health benefits of Rubus species include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The bioactive constituents of Rubus species include anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and salicylic acid. The most common herbal preparations made with Rubus species include teas, tinctures, and jams, which are often used to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
